section.div: Real-time chat platform with secure authentication, instant messaging, WebSocket communication, and scalable backend architecture.
Smart logistics platform for tracking last-mile deliveries with live status updates, route optimization, and delivery management.
Scalable music streaming platform built with microservices, featuring JWT authentication, Redis caching, API Gateway, and real-time backend services
AI-powered disaster response system using YOLO detection, FastAPI, and drone simulation for survivor detection, mission control, and emergency management.
